privileged_info_summary: The task configures gradebook categories for a synthetic OpenSIS course. The course 'Mathematics 101' is created in the database during setup (setup_task.sh line 38). The teacher 'Alan Turing' is created with email alan.turing@school.edu (setup_task.sh lines 25-26). The agent must create three assignment categories: Homework (20%), Quizzes (30%), and Exams (50%), which sum correctly to 100%. All metadata values are consistent across task.json, setup scripts, export script, and verifier logic. No external data sources are used; all data is synthetic and created locally.
